blurb: Develops and delivers digital government services, expands broadband connectivity across Alberta, supports innovation and research, and protects Albertans' privacy and data in the digital age.

goals.title: OUTCOME 1: Albertans have access to high-speed internet and digital services
goals.description: The ministry develops digital government services and expands broadband infrastructure to ensure all Albertans can access essential online services and participate in the digital economy.

foundational_services.name: Develop digital government strategy and broadband infrastructure
foundational_services.desc: Coordinates the government's digital transformation and broadband expansion strategy. Develops policies and funding programs to increase high-speed internet availability, improves online service delivery across government, and ensures digital accessibility standards.
foundational_services.users: Government digital teams, broadband providers, Treasury Board

supporting.name: Check broadband availability in your area
supporting.desc: Albertans can check broadband availability and speed in their area through an online tool. The tool shows current high-speed internet coverage and identifies areas where expansion is planned.
supporting.users: Rural residents, municipalities, businesses, broadband providers

reach_estimate.estimate: Hundreds of thousands of Albertans check broadband availability
reach_estimate.basis: Rural communities and underserved areas rely on broadband expansion information

economic_impact.note: Broadband access enables rural economic development, education, and health services

supporting.name: Apply for rural or Indigenous community broadband funding
supporting.desc: Rural municipalities, Indigenous communities, and service providers can apply for government funding to expand broadband infrastructure. The program provides grants and subsidies for network build-out in underserved areas.
supporting.users: Rural municipalities, Indigenous communities, broadband service providers

reach_estimate.estimate: Dozens of funding applications from rural and Indigenous communities annually
reach_estimate.basis: Broadband funding supports infrastructure expansion in underserved areas

economic_impact.note: Broadband funding closes the digital divide and enables rural community participation in digital economy

supporting.name: Access your Alberta.ca account and digital wallet
supporting.desc: Albertans can create and manage an Alberta.ca account to access government services online, view benefits, pay bills, and manage identity information. The digital wallet enables secure presentation of government credentials.

reach_estimate.estimate: Millions of Albertans with active accounts
reach_estimate.basis: Alberta.ca accounts provide access to education, health, social services, and licensing

economic_impact.note: Digital accounts enable convenient, secure access to government services 24/7

supporting.name: Find government services online
supporting.desc: Albertans can search and access online government services, applications, and information through a centralized portal. Services include licensing, permit applications, payment systems, and benefit access.

reach_estimate.estimate: Millions of Albertans use online services annually
reach_estimate.basis: All online government services are accessible through Alberta.ca

economic_impact.note: Centralized online services reduce administrative burden and improve access

goals.title: OUTCOME 2: Alberta's technology and innovation ecosystem is thriving
goals.description: The ministry supports Alberta's technology, innovation, and research sectors through funding, infrastructure development, and business supports. The ministry attracts investment in artificial intelligence, data centres, and emerging technologies.

foundational_services.name: Develop Alberta's technology and AI strategy
foundational_services.desc: Develops and coordinates the government's technology, artificial intelligence, and data centre strategy to position Alberta as a global innovation leader. Identifies priority sectors, sets research and commercialization goals, and attracts major technology investments.
foundational_services.users: Government policy makers, technology leaders, investors

supporting.name: Apply for Alberta Innovates research or commercialization funding
supporting.desc: Researchers, entrepreneurs, and companies can apply for Alberta Innovates funding to support research projects, technology development, and commercialization of innovations. Funding programs include grants for basic research, applied research, and commercialization.
supporting.users: Researchers, research institutions, entrepreneurs, technology companies

reach_estimate.estimate: Hundreds of research and commercialization grants awarded annually
reach_estimate.basis: Alberta Innovates funds innovation across health, technology, and resource sectors

economic_impact.note: Research funding accelerates innovation, supports economic diversification, and creates high-value jobs

supporting.name: Access supports for technology startups and entrepreneurs
supporting.desc: Technology entrepreneurs can access mentoring, incubation programs, networking events, and business support services. Programs help startups develop business models, secure funding, and scale operations.

reach_estimate.estimate: Hundreds of startups access government support services annually
reach_estimate.basis: Alberta's technology startup ecosystem benefits from government mentoring and networking

economic_impact.note: Startup support drives technology commercialization and creates new business opportunities

main_services.name: Attract and support data centre and AI investment

supporting.name: Learn about Alberta's AI and data centre opportunities
supporting.desc: Technology companies and investors can learn about Alberta's competitive advantages for data centre and AI investment, including available infrastructure, supportive regulations, competitive electricity costs, and government incentive programs.
supporting.users: Technology investors, data centre operators, AI companies

channels.label: Alberta AI and data centre investment information

reach_estimate.estimate: Dozens of companies and investors evaluate Alberta for data centre and AI opportunities
reach_estimate.basis: Data centre and AI investment is a priority sector for government

economic_impact.note: Data centre and AI investment attracts technology companies and creates high-wage employment

goals.title: OUTCOME 3: Albertans' privacy and data are protected
goals.description: The ministry protects Albertans' personal information and digital security through privacy legislation, data protection standards, cybersecurity initiatives, and public awareness programs.

foundational_services.name: Develop privacy, data ethics, and cybersecurity policy
foundational_services.desc: Develops and enforces privacy laws, data protection standards, and cybersecurity policies that protect Albertans' personal information. Establishes government-wide data ethics principles and cybersecurity requirements.
foundational_services.users: Government privacy and security officials, policy makers

supporting.name: Learn about how government collects and uses your personal information
supporting.desc: Albertans can access information about government privacy practices, how personal information is collected, used, and protected. Includes resources on privacy rights, data collection standards, and protection mechanisms.

reach_estimate.estimate: Hundreds of thousands of Albertans access privacy information
reach_estimate.basis: Privacy information is widely accessed when individuals interact with government

economic_impact.note: Privacy transparency builds public trust in government information handling

supporting.name: Access cybersecurity resources and tips
supporting.desc: Albertans can access cybersecurity resources, safety tips, and education materials to protect themselves from online threats, identity theft, and scams. Includes information on secure passwords, phishing protection, and digital safety.

reach_estimate.estimate: Hundreds of thousands of Albertans access cybersecurity resources
reach_estimate.basis: Cybersecurity awareness is essential for all internet users

economic_impact.note: Cybersecurity education reduces fraud losses and protects individuals and businesses from attack
